creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Updating port math/openblas fails as shown in the following error message:

[...]
===>  Cleaning for openblas-0.2.7
===>  License BSD accepted by the user
===>  Found saved configuration for openblas-0.2.5
===>   openblas-0.2.7 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg - found
===> Fetching all distfiles required by openblas-0.2.7 for building
===>  Extracting for openblas-0.2.7
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for openblas/openblas-0.2.7.tar.gz.
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for openblas/large.tgz.
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for openblas/timing.tgz.
/bin/mkdir -p /usr/ports/math/openblas/work/lib
===>  Patching for openblas-0.2.7
===>  Applying FreeBSD patches for openblas-0.2.7
  I can't seem to find a patch in there anywhere.
=> Patch patch-exports+gensymbol failed to apply cleanly.
=> Patch(es) patch-Makefile patch-Makefile.rule patch-Makefile.system patch-c_check patch-cpuid_ia64.c patch-cpuid_sparc.c patch-exports+Makefile applied cleanly.
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/math/openblas
*** Error code 1

How-To-Repeat: Try to install/update recent port math/openblas as of ports-tree revision Revision: 324097
